headline: Google expands partnership with Intel for AI chips

headline: AI's Hidden Choke Point: Why US-Made Chips Still Depend On Taiwan
summary: AI chipmaking hits a wall: advanced packaging. Learn why shipping U.S. chips to Taiwan for final assembly is a major supply chain risk.
